description_long: This ornate chandelier features a multi-tiered arrangement of gracefully curved arms, each supporting a candle-like bulb at its tip. The central column is elongated and tapers upward, adorned with intricate scrollwork and decorative motifs. Hanging crystal pendants accentuate the ends of each arm, adding a touch of elegance and refracting light for a sparkling effect. The fixture is suspended by a chain, suggesting it is designed to hang from a ceiling. The overall finish is a weathered gold or bronze, giving it a vintage, classical appearance. The combination of metalwork and crystal elements makes it a striking centerpiece suitable for grand urban interiors or historic public spaces.
description: An ornate, multi-arm chandelier with candle-style bulbs, crystal pendants, and a vintage gold finish, suspended by a chain. Its intricate scrollwork and decorative crystals create a luxurious, classical look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of arms, candle-like bulbs, and prominent crystal pendants.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the side arms and the depth of the scrollwork and crystal details.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, with the same ornate arm and crystal arrangement visible.
description_view_3: Another angled view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the distribution of decorative elements.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and classical with ornate scrollwork, candle-style bulbs, and hanging crystal pendants, evoking a sense of old-world luxury and elegance.
